metadata.description: Maps grayscale values to color gradient - complex but achievable

summary: Takes a [0-1] input and maps it through a color gradient. Equivalent to Unity ColorRamp or custom Lerp chain.

parameters.Fac: Input [0, 1] value to map across gradient

implementation.approach_1: Series of Lerp nodes for 2-3 color stops (simple)
implementation.approach_2: Custom function with color array lookup

typical_use: Two-color: Lerp(Color1, Color2, Fac). Three+ colors: nested Lerp or custom
complexity: Increases with number of color stops - 2 colors trivial, 5+ requires custom code
compatibility_loss_25_percent: Exact interpolation and gradient curves may differ for advanced setups
example: Temperature map: blue(cold) → red(hot) based on value
